job_title: Full Stack Cloud Engineer (AI Security Platform)
job_nlp_title: Full Stack Cloud Engineer (AI Security Platform)
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Cloud Engineer
must_have_quals: Strong full-stack experience shipping and operating production software, Proficiency with Go and/or Python (service development in production), Proficiency with TypeScript + React, Hands-on experience with AWS or Azure, Strong experience with Kubernetes + Docker / containers, Experience designing or working in microservices / distributed systems, ideally with low-latency requirements, Experience in Agile delivery environments (iterative planning, continuous improvement), Track record of building automated test coverage that supports safe continuous deployment, Strong communication skills; you proactively align stakeholders and surface tradeoffs, Comfort with ambiguity and a bias for action, you move forward while clarifying what needs to be figured out
preferred_quals: Exposure to ML/AI concepts or building adjacent to ML workflows, Experience building security products, cloud security tooling, or security ecosystem integrations, Familiarity with observability (OpenTelemetry, metrics/logs/traces) and defining SLOs/SLIs, Experience with API gateways, service mesh, event-driven systems, or contract testing, Infrastructure-as-Code experience (Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation, Bicep)
core_responsibilities: Ship end-to-end platform features (UI → API → cloud services) that customers rely on daily, Improve performance and reliability of low-latency, distributed services running in Kubernetes, Increase deployment confidence and velocity through strong automated test coverage and CI/CD, Deliver integrations that connect HiddenLayer into the broader cloud, AI, and security ecosystems, Design and implement microservices in Go and/or Python, with clear API contracts and interoperability, Build and operate cloud-native services on AWS or Azure, deployed as containerized workloads on Kubernetes, Build and evolve customer-facing product experiences using TypeScript + React, Own performance: profile, troubleshoot, and optimize p95/p99 latency, throughput, and resource efficiency, Strengthen delivery: maintain test strategies (unit/integration/e2e) that enable continuous deployment, Improve operational excellence: logging/metrics/tracing, alerting, on-call readiness, runbooks, and incident follow-ups
job_summary: HiddenLayer is a company dedicated to protecting valuable technologies from adversarial AI attacks. They are seeking a Full Stack Cloud Engineer to design and implement microservices, build cloud-native services, and enhance customer-facing product experiences while ensuring performance and operational excellence.
